visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Aliquot Sum Efficiency
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided `aliquot_sum` function has O(n) complexity. For large numbers, this is inefficient. Refactor the function to find divisors in O(sqrt(n)) time.

solution.explanation: To optimize the divisor search, we only iterate up to `sqrt(n)`. For each divisor `i` found, `n // i` is also a divisor. This reduces complexity from O(n) to O(sqrt(n)), which is much faster for large numbers.
